# ANcpLua Framework Documentation

> MSBuild SDK with Roslyn analyzers, polyfills, and sensible defaults for .NET 10.

## Sections

- **SDK** (`/sdk/*`): MSBuild SDK configuration, variants, properties
- **Analyzers** (`/analyzers/*`): 102 diagnostic rules (AL0001–AL0106) + 2 refactorings (AR0001–AR0002)
- **Utilities** (`/utilities/*`): Roslyn utilities for source generators
- **ErrorOrX** (`/erroror/*`): Error handling library with source generator
- **qyl** (`/qyl/*`): Observability platform
- **API** (`/api-reference/*`): qyl observability REST API

## SDK Variants

| Variant | Use Case |
|---------|----------|
| `ANcpLua.NET.Sdk` | Libraries, Console, Workers |
| `ANcpLua.NET.Sdk.Web` | ASP.NET Core APIs (OpenTelemetry, health endpoints) |
| `ANcpLua.NET.Sdk.Test` | xUnit v3 with Microsoft Testing Platform |

## Key Pages

### Getting Started
- `/index` - Overview and installation
- `/quickstart` - Step-by-step setup

### SDK
- `/sdk/overview` - Feature summary
- `/sdk/variants` - Variant comparison
- `/sdk/msbuild-properties` - All MSBuild properties
- `/sdk/service-defaults` - Web SDK configuration
- `/sdk/polyfills` - netstandard2.0 compatibility
- `/sdk/banned-apis` - Deprecated API enforcement
- `/sdk/testing` - Test base classes
- `/sdk/extensions` - SDK extensions
- `/sdk/shared-utilities` - Shared utilities
- `/sdk/configuration-files` - Configuration files

### Analyzers
- `/analyzers/overview` - Rule table with severity
- `/analyzers/configuration` - EditorConfig settings
- `/analyzers/rules/AL0001` through `/analyzers/rules/AL0096` - Core diagnostic rules
- `/analyzers/rules/AL0101` through `/analyzers/rules/AL0106` - Extended diagnostic rules
- `/analyzers/rules/AR0001` - Refactoring 1
- `/analyzers/rules/AR0002` - Refactoring 2

### Utilities
- `/utilities/overview` - Package overview
- `/utilities/diagnostic-flow` - Railway-oriented diagnostics
- `/utilities/pipeline` - Pipeline patterns
- `/utilities/contexts` - Context utilities
- `/utilities/patterns` - Symbol pattern matching
- `/utilities/operations` - Operation utilities
- `/utilities/symbols` - Symbol utilities
- `/utilities/semantic-guard` - Declarative validation
- `/utilities/codegen` - Code generation utilities
- `/utilities/guard` - Guard utilities
- `/utilities/testing` - Testing utilities

### ErrorOrX
- `/erroror/overview` - Error handling overview
- `/erroror/http-mapping` - HTTP result mapping
- `/erroror/generator` - Source generator
- `/erroror/api-versioning` - API versioning
- `/erroror/diagnostics` - Diagnostics

### qyl
- `/qyl/overview` - Observability platform overview
- `/qyl/configuration` - Configuration
- `/qyl/dashboard` - Dashboard features
- `/qyl/mcp` - MCP integration

## Navigation Hints

| Query | Page |
|-------|------|
| "getting started", "setup", "install" | `/quickstart` |
| "MSBuild properties" | `/sdk/msbuild-properties` |
| "polyfills", "netstandard" | `/sdk/polyfills` |
| "banned APIs", "DateTime", "lock" | `/sdk/banned-apis` |
| "analyzer rules", "AL0XXX" | `/analyzers/rules/AL0XXX` |
| "refactoring", "AR0XXX" | `/analyzers/rules/AR0XXX` |
| "source generators", "Roslyn" | `/utilities/overview` |
| "DiagnosticFlow", "railway" | `/utilities/diagnostic-flow` |
| "testing", "xUnit", "MTP" | `/sdk/testing` |
| "OpenTelemetry", "web", "health" | `/sdk/service-defaults` |
| "error handling", "ErrorOr" | `/erroror/overview` |
| "observability", "traces", "spans" | `/qyl/overview` |
| "MCP", "Model Context Protocol" | `/qyl/mcp` |

## Requirements

- .NET 10 SDK
- Central Package Management (`ManagePackageVersionsCentrally=true`)

## External Links

- Live docs: https://ancplua.io
- NuGet: https://www.nuget.org/profiles/ANcpLua

### GitHub Repos

- https://github.com/ANcpLua/ANcpLua.NET.Sdk
- https://github.com/ANcpLua/ANcpLua.Analyzers
- https://github.com/ANcpLua/ANcpLua.Roslyn.Utilities
- https://github.com/ANcpLua/ErrorOrX
- https://github.com/ANcpLua/ancplua-docs
- https://github.com/ANcpLua/ancplua-claude-plugins
